summary.en: Directive 2014/30/EU is mandatory for in-scope apparatus, including many motor-driven tools, electronic speed controllers, chargers, and power supplies. The product must not generate excessive electromagnetic disturbance and must have adequate immunity. Harmonised EMC standards are voluntary routes to presumption of conformity.
summary.zh: 指令 2014/30/EU 对适用设备具有强制性，包括许多电机驱动工具、电子调速器、充电器和电源。产品不得产生过量电磁骚扰，并应具备足够抗扰度。协调 EMC 标准是自愿符合性推定路径。
summary.zht: 指令 2014/30/EU 對適用設備具有強制性，包括許多電機驅動工具、電子調速器、充電器和電源。產品不得產生過量電磁騷擾，並應具備足夠抗擾度。協調 EMC 標準是自願符合性推定路徑。

standards_or_laws: Relevant harmonised EN EMC standards [voluntary presumption route]

summary.en: China compliance packages may include EMC reports alongside GB 3883 safety reports. Test limits, configuration, worst-case operating modes, charger inclusion, and EU declaration wording still need EU-specific review.
summary.zh: 中国合规包可能在 GB 3883 安全报告之外包含 EMC 报告。测试限值、配置、最不利工况、是否包含充电器以及欧盟符合性声明措辞仍需按欧盟要求复核。
summary.zht: 中國合規包可能在 GB 3883 安全報告之外包含 EMC 報告。測試限值、配置、最不利工況、是否包含充電器以及歐盟符合性聲明措辭仍需按歐盟要求覆核。

standards_or_laws: China EMC standards and test reports where applicable

gap.en: A frequent EU gap is a report that tests only the bare tool but omits the charger, battery pack, electronic controller variants, or worst-case load conditions. The EU technical file should show the exact marketed configuration and justify representative-model coverage.
gap.zh: 常见欧盟差距是报告只测试裸工具，而遗漏充电器、电池包、电子控制器变体或最不利负载条件。欧盟技术文件应显示实际销售配置，并说明代表型号覆盖的合理性。
gap.zht: 常見歐盟差距是報告只測試裸工具，而遺漏充電器、電池包、電子控制器變體或最不利負載條件。歐盟技術文件應顯示實際銷售配置，並說明代表型號覆蓋的合理性。

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation: Directive 2014/30/EU for in-scope apparatus. Harmonised EMC standards are voluntary and should not be described as mandatory.
target.zh: 强制法律义务：适用设备须符合指令 2014/30/EU。协调 EMC 标准为自愿标准，不应描述为强制要求。
target.zht: 強制法律義務：適用設備須符合指令 2014/30/EU。協調 EMC 標準為自願標準，不應描述為強制要求。

cn.en: China domestic files may include EMC evidence, but EU acceptance depends on scope, limits, configuration, and declaration mapping.
cn.zh: 中国境内文件可包含 EMC 证据，但欧盟接受性取决于范围、限值、配置和声明映射。
cn.zht: 中國境內文件可包含 EMC 證據，但歐盟接受性取決於範圍、限值、配置和聲明映射。

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: Not EU-ready until EMC evidence covers the actual EU-marketed tool system and is tied to Directive 2014/30/EU in the technical documentation and EU declaration of conformity.
compliance_verdict.zh: 在 EMC 证据覆盖实际投放欧盟市场的工具系统，并在技术文件和欧盟符合性声明中对应指令 2014/30/EU 前，不能视为欧盟就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: 在 EMC 證據覆蓋實際投放歐盟市場的工具系統，並在技術文件和歐盟符合性聲明中對應指令 2014/30/EU 前，不能視為歐盟就緒。
